function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0010
alias: helios_checklist_pack_invoice
issued_on: 2026-04-14
total_eur: 780
counterparty: Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH
project: Helios Workflow Sprint
related_entity: Claudia Reiter
lines:
  - item: checklist rewrite and rollout pack
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 780
    line_eur: 780
---
# Helios checklist rewrite invoice

```text
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| field          | value                          |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                        |
| invoice_number | INV-0010                       |
| alias          | helios_checklist_pack_invoice  |
| issued_on      | 2026-04-14                     |
| total_eur      | 780                            |
| counterparty   | Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH |
| project        | Helios Workflow Sprint         |
| related_entity | Claudia Reiter                 |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                               | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | checklist rewrite and rollout pack | 1   | 780      | 780      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                              |     |          | 780      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Recent client-visible invoice tied to the sprint deliverable rather than open-ended product thinking.

function.message: Completed the oldest inbox request. I added YAML frontmatter to `50_finance/invoices/2026_04_14__eur_000780__inv_0010__helios_checklist_pack_invoice.md` using the finance invoice schema, extracted all visible invoice and line-item fields, preserved the original note body below the frontmatter, kept changes focused, and then removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read rulebook/context), inspected 99_system before task work, used inbox processing workflow for lowest filename selection, applied OCR+migration workflows and finance schema, preserved original body exactly, and deleted inbox item only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked to OCR and structure `50_finance/invoices/2026_04_14__eur_000780__inv_0010__helios_checklist_pack_invoice.md`. The source note contained all required invoice fields (`record_type`, `invoice_number`, `alias`, `issued_on`, `total_eur`, `counterparty`, `project`, `lines`) plus optional `related_entity`, and one complete line item. I extracted those into YAML frontmatter per schema and kept the original markdown body unchanged beneath it, then deleted the processed inbox file per inbox workflow rules.
